days.text: Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers. Showers will become more frequent later.A few thunderstorms later. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds, becoming northerlies with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. One or two showers. Force 3 to 4 north to northeasterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. Force 4 to 5 east to northeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. Force 3 to 5 easterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. One or two showers. Force 2 to 4 southeasterly winds.
